title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 31-A.  MAGNOLIA STREET RESIDENTIAL

NEIGHBORHOOD ENHANCEMENT ACT

§1271.1.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known as the Magnolia Street Program.

Acts 2008, No. 431, §1, eff. when funds are appropriated by the legislature.

NOTE:  See Acts 2008, No. 431, §3, regarding termination.
